title: Bharat Heavy Electricals is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bharat Heavy Electricals is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
